art_highlights: Global Art Market Report 2026 shows 4% growth to $59.6B in 2025, driven by a 9% auction sales jump
Lauren Halsey's 'sister dreamer' (LA) and Arthur Jafa's 'The White Album' (Hammer Museum) are key current exhibitions
Whitney Biennial 2026 and Anna Maria Maiolino's 'Poetic Earth' currently on view in NYC
London auction results for March 2026 show strong performance, with Frank Auerbach's 'Christmas Tree at Mornington Crescent' as a highlight
Chicago features 'LENS2026' photography exhibition and George Klauba's 'KLAUBA' survey

market_summary.market_sentiment: Recovery with 4% growth; high-end sector ($10M+) leading; dealers focused on local markets due to rising costs
market_summary.key_drivers: Strong auction performance, resilience of high-end works, and diversified buyer base
market_summary.trend: US market dominates (44% share); 43% of dealers expect sales growth in 2026; Digital art momentum rising
